Then 'if (page.url().includes("login"))' is FALSE because we are still on /register/password. Helper exits without doing manual login.

_summary: The helper's URL-predicate matched too early. The goto navigation to /candidate/login completes a few hundred ms LATER (asynchronously), but by then the test has already proceeded past the helper to line 138 (terms-checkbox locator) and line 139 (expect toBeVisible).
